content.problemStatement:
Today Chef wants to evaluate the dishes of his NNN students. He asks each one to cook a dish and present it to him.

Chef loves his secret ingredient, and only likes dishes with at least XXX grams of it.
Given NNN, XXX and the amount of secret ingredient used by each student AiA_iAi‚Äã, find out whether Chef will like at least one dish.

###Input:


First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
The first line of each testcase contains two integers NNN
(number of students) and XXX (minimum amount of secret ingredient that a dish must contain for Chef to like it).
The next line contains NNN space separated integers, AiA_iAi‚Äã denoting the amount of secret ingredient used by the students in their dishes.
###Output:
For each testcase, print a single string "YES" if Chef likes at least one dish. Otherwise, print "NO". (Without quotes).

###Constraints:


1‚â§T‚â§1001 \leq T \leq 1001‚â§T‚â§100
1‚â§N‚â§10001 \leq N \leq 10001‚â§N‚â§1000
1‚â§X‚â§10000001 \leq X \leq 10000001‚â§X‚â§1000000
1‚â§Ai‚â§10000001 \leq A_i \leq 10000001‚â§Ai‚Äã‚â§1000000
